snap.name: SNAP
snap.description: Monthly electronic benefit to help purchase groceries.
snap.imputed_monthly_value_note: Use maximum_allotments_monthly from snap_2026.json for cliff modeling
required_documents: Photo ID (driver's license, state ID, or passport)
Proof of residency (utility bill, lease, or recent mail)
Social Security numbers for all household members applying
Proof of income (recent pay stubs, employer letter, or most recent tax return)
Proof of allowable expenses (rent/mortgage, utilities, childcare if claiming deductions)

medicaid.name: Medicaid
medicaid.description: Free or low-cost comprehensive health coverage for adults.
medicaid.imputed_monthly_value_note: Approximate value of adult Medicaid coverage for cliff modeling. Not a real dollar benefit.
required_documents: Proof of income (pay stubs, tax return, or signed zero-income statement)

chip.name: CHIP
chip.description: Low-cost health coverage for children in households earning too much for Medicaid.
chip.imputed_monthly_value_note: Approximate value of CHIP coverage per child for cliff modeling.

liheap.name: LIHEAP
liheap.full_name: Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program
liheap.description: Help paying home heating and cooling energy bills.
liheap.processing_time_days: Varies — apply early, funds are limited
liheap.imputed_monthly_value_note: Approximate average LIHEAP benefit annualized. Actual varies widely by state.
required_documents: Proof of income for all household members (last 30 days)
Most recent utility bills (heating and/or cooling)
Social Security numbers for all household members
Proof of residency (lease or utility bill in your name)

wic.name: WIC
wic.full_name: Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children
wic.description: Supplemental food, nutrition education, and healthcare referrals for pregnant women, new mothers, and young children.
wic.processing_time_days: Same day or next day at WIC clinic
wic.renewal_period: Every 6 months; ends when child turns 5
wic.imputed_monthly_value_note: Approximate WIC food benefit value per eligible person per month.
required_documents: Proof of identity (photo ID or child's birth certificate)
Proof of income or participation in SNAP/Medicaid/TANF (auto-income-eligible)
Proof of pregnancy (for pregnant women — doctor's note or due date)

tanf.name: TANF
tanf.description: Short-term cash assistance for families with children. Rules vary significantly by state.
tanf.data_source: HHS Administration for Children and Families
tanf.renewal_period: Varies by state; federal lifetime limit of 60 months
tanf.imputed_monthly_value_note: Do not include in cliff modeling — too state-variable. Flag as candidate, direct to state agency.
required_documents: Photo ID for all adults in household
Social Security numbers for all household members
